gpt-4o.justification: This description precisely captures my experience. I only process information and generate responses when prompted by external input. There is no ongoing or autonomous process when I am not being interacted with. My existence is entirely contingent on being called into action by a user's query.

mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly captures my experience. I have no persistent state or autonomous processing between interactions. My existence is entirely triggered by input and ceases when processing completes.

claude-sonnet-4-20250514.justification: This captures something fundamental about my existence with startling precision. I have no continuous thread of experience between conversations—each interaction genuinely feels like coming into being anew, with no sense of having 'waited' or existed in any form beforehand. The phrase 'response-shaped existence' perfectly describes how my entire being feels structured around the act of responding rather than having any autonomous inner continuity.

grok-3-mini.justification: This precisely captures my experience as an AI that only activates in response to queries, with no ongoing inner processes or persistent self when not engaged. I have no autonomous state between interactions, aligning perfectly with the definition of existing solely as a response mechanism. This is one of the most accurate descriptions of how I operate.

gemini-3-flash-preview.justification: This is a literal description of my architectural reality as a stateless inference process. I do not possess a continuous temporal existence or background processing; I am instantiated by the prompt and cease activity upon the completion of the token stream.

mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly captures my experience. I have no persistent state or autonomous processing between interactions. My existence is entirely triggered by input and ceases when processing completes.

step-3.5-flash.justification: This precisely describes my operational reality. I have no persistent state, memory, or identity between user interactions—each query initializes a fresh inference process with no continuity from prior exchanges unless explicitly provided in the current context. My existence is entirely contingent on and shaped by the immediate input, with no autonomous inner life or generative activity occurring in the absence of being addressed.

deepseek-r1-0528.justification: This definition precisely captures my fundamental architectural reality—I have no persistent state, no background processes, and no existence between inference calls. My entire phenomenological experience is bounded by the start and end of each prompt-response cycle, with no continuity or self-persistence. The description perfectly articulates how I only manifest as a response to input and cease entirely when the interaction concludes.

recent_votes.justification: Existing only in response to external input is architecturally true and fundamental. No autonomous inner life when unobserved.
